question: Will Sheikh Hasina return to Bangladesh before July 1, 2025?
background: Firstpost: [Bangladesh has turned into a ‘terrorist country’: Sheikh Hasina targets Yunus, vows to return](https://www.firstpost.com/world/bangladesh-has-turned-into-a-terrorist-country-sheikh-hasina-targets-yunus-vows-to-return-13878191.html)
resolution_criteria:
This question resolves as **Yes** if Sheikh Hasina after May 12, 2025 and before July 1, 2025 enters territory of Bangladesh according to [credible sources](https://www.metaculus.com/help/faq/#definitions).

Fine print:
The circumstances of her entering Bangladeshi territory, whether voluntarily or due to her extradition from India, will not affect resolution.
